title: Waiting in the Summer
sourceNotes: Single season, 12 episodes. The 12-episode 2012 TV anime is an anime-original story; the 3-volume, 11-chapter manga by Pepako Dokuta (serialized in Dengeki Daioh, Mar. 2012-Feb. 2013) is a close tie-in adaptation that ran concurrently with the TV broadcast, compressing roughly one chapter per episode. Manga complete at 11 chapters. A separate light-novel adaptation (AniList id 84597, 30 chapters/2 volumes) also exists but is not used here. No distinct named story arcs; the show is a single continuous slice-of-life romance plot.
